knowledgeCategories.head: Notices
knowledgeCategories.blurb: Time-bound communications — statutory notices, wage revisions, safety alerts, schedules.

knowledgeCategories.head: Transport
knowledgeCategories.blurb: Worker transport — bus routes, pickup points, transport safety, shift schedules.

knowledgeSample.native: If there is a fire, where should I go? Which is the assembly point?

Go to your zone's assembly point:
1. Compressor Line → Area-A assembly point (near Gate 2)
2. Paint Shop → Area-C assembly point (behind the canteen)
3. Warehouse → Area-B assembly point
🚶 Do not use elevators. Report to your supervisor at the assembly point.
knowledgeSample.answerText: Go to your zone's assembly point. Compressor Line → Area-A (near Gate 2); Paint Shop → Area-C (behind the canteen); Warehouse → Area-B. Do not use elevators. Report to your supervisor at the assembly point.

knowledgeSample.native: What time does the bus reach the Tambaram pickup point?

Company transport — Tambaram pickup
• Morning shift: Route 4 bus departs Tambaram at 06:10, reaches Gate 2 by 07:05.
• General shift: Route 4 departs 08:00, reaches by 08:55.
• Late-shift drop: last bus leaves the plant at 23:15.
Be at the pickup point 5 minutes early — buses do not wait beyond the scheduled minute.
knowledgeSample.answerText: Company transport Route 4 serves the Tambaram pickup point. Morning shift bus departs 06:10 and reaches Gate 2 by 07:05; general shift departs 08:00, reaching by 08:55. The last late-shift drop leaves the plant at 23:15. Be at the pickup point 5 minutes early — buses do not wait beyond the scheduled minute.
